wallets_description: Kunezikhwama ze-Bitcoin eziningi ezihlukene ngezindlela ezibalulekile. Ungathola ukuthi isikhwama sikufanele yini ngokubuza le mibuzo elula.
wallets_s1_c1: Izikhwama ze-Bitcoin ziyasebenzisana, ngakho ungathumela i-Bitcoin kunoma ubani noma ngabe basebenzisa siphi isikhwama.
wallets_s1_c2: Kunezikhwama ze-Bitcoin eziningi ezihlukene ngezindlela ezibalulekile. Ungathola ukuthi isikhwama sikufanele yini ngokubuza le mibuzo elula:
wallets_s2_c1: Enye yezinto ezintsha ze-Bitcoin amandla okuyigcina ngaphandle kokuncika kumgcini, njengobhange.
wallets_s2_c2: Uma ugcina i-bitcoin ku-exchange noma ku-ETF, ulahlekelwa yizinzuzo zenkululeko ze-bitcoin.
wallets_s2_c3: Izikhwama zokuzigcinela zivula amandla aphelele e-Bitcoin: imali yenkululeko.
wallets_s2_c4: Ngesikhwama sokuzigcinela, nguwe wedwa onamandla okusebenzisa noma ukudlulisela imali yakho. Akekho ongakuvimba ukuthumela noma ukuthola imali yakho lapho usebenzisa isikhwama sokuzigcinela.
wallets_s2_c5: Izikhwama zokuzigcinela zibizwa futhi ngokuthi izikhwama ezingagciniwe.
wallets_s3_c1: Izikhwama ezigciniwe yizikhwama lapho ungalawuli khona imali yakho.
wallets_s3_c2: Lezi zikhwama zifana kakhulu nesis-timu yamabhange lapho kumele uthembe umuntu wesithathu ukukunika ukufinyelela emalini yakho. Uma i-Bitcoin yakho iku-exchange, usebenzisa isikhwama esigciniwe.
wallets_s3_c3: Uma uthenge i-Bitcoin ETF, usebenzisa isikhwama esigciniwe esingakuvumeli ukuikhipha ukuze uzigcinele.
wallets_s3_c4: Izikhwama ezigciniwe zingabonakala zilula, kodwa umgcini unamandla ezobuchwepheshe okweba yonke imali yabasebenzisi nganoma yisiphi isikhathi.
wallets_s3_c5: Hhayi okhiye bakho, hhayi izinhlamvu zakho!
wallets_s4_c1: Izikhwama ezibandayo zigcina okhiye be-Bitcoin yakho ngendlela engakaze ibaveze ku-inthanethi.
wallets_s4_c2: Lokhu kunciphisa kakhulu izindlela zohlaselo umuntu angazisebenzisa ukuzama ukweba i-Bitcoin yakho, futhi kusetshenziswa kahle kakhulu ngezinani ezinkulu ze-Bitcoin ongazidingi ukuzidlulisela njalo.
wallets_s4_c3: Ungacabanga ngesikhwama esibandayo njengo-akhawunti yokonga isikhathi eside, okwaziwa futhi ngokuthi ukugcina okubandayo.
wallets_s5_c1: Izikhwama ezishisayo zigcina okhiye be-Bitcoin yakho kudivayisi exhumene ne-inthanethi, njengefoni yakho.
wallets_s5_c2: Izikhwama ezishisayo ngokuvamile zibhekwa njengeziphephile, kodwa zingaba nezingozi zokuphepha eziningi kunezikhwama ezibandayo.
wallets_s5_c3: Ungacabanga ngesikhwama esishisayo njengoba ucabanga ngesikhwama senyama. Awugcini konke okukongiwe esikhwameni sakho, kodwa ugcina imali yokusebenzisa.
wallets_s5_c4: Izikhwama ezishisayo zenza kube lula kakhulu ukusebenzisa i-Bitcoin yakho ngaphandle kokukhipha konke okukongiwe ekugcineni okubandayo.
wallets_s6_c1: Lapho usetha isikhwama sakho se-Bitcoin, idivayisi yakho izodala umshwana wokubuyisa. Lo mushwana wokubuyisa (obizwa futhi ngokuthi i-seed phrase) unezwi ezingu-12 noma ezingu-24.
wallets_s6_c2: Uma ulahlekelwa ukufinyelela esikhwameni sakho noma idivayisi yakho iyeka ukusebenza, ungafaka lo mushwana wokubuyisa esikhwameni esisha ukuze uphinde uthole ukufinyelela ku-Bitcoin yakho.
wallets_s6_c3: Izikhwama eziningi zifaka iphephe lokubhala umshwana wakho wokubuyisa, kodwa abantu abaningi bakhetha ukugcina lo mushwana ensimbini kunalokho. Lokhu kwenza kube ngcono kancane ukulahlekelwa umushwana wakho wokubuyisa uma kwenzeka inhlekelele yemvelo efana nomlilo noma isikhukhula.
wallets_s6_c4: U-Jameson Lopp uhlole amakhithi angu-70 okugcina ensimbini ukuze akusize ukukhetha okukufanele.
wallets_s6_c5: Buka umhlahlandlela ka-Jameson wokugcina ensimbini we-Bitcoin lapha.
wallets_s6_c6: Noma uqhubeke ukhuphuka ukuze uhlole izinketho zezikhwama ze-Bitcoin.
